---
name: New Project Request
about: Submit a request for a new software project
title: "[PROJECT] "
labels: "type:new-project, stage:intake"
assignees: ''
---

## Business Problem

**What problem does this project solve?**
<!-- Describe the business problem clearly. What is happening today that is unacceptable? What opportunity are we missing? -->



## Expected Outcome

**What does success look like?**
<!-- Describe the desired end state. What will be different when this project is complete? -->



## Affected Users / Systems

**Who or what is impacted?**
<!-- List the user groups, internal teams, or systems that this project affects -->

-

## Urgency

**How urgent is this request?**
<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] P0 — Critical: Blocking revenue, compliance, or operations
- [ ] P1 — High: Needed this quarter
- [ ] P2 — Medium: Needed within 6 months
- [ ] P3 — Low: Nice to have, no hard deadline

## Business Justification

**Why should we do this now?**
<!-- What is the cost of not doing this? Is there a revenue impact, compliance deadline, or competitive pressure? -->



## Known Constraints

**Are there any known limitations or dependencies?**
<!-- Budget constraints, technology restrictions, regulatory requirements, dependencies on other teams or projects -->



## Additional Context

**Anything else we should know?**
<!-- Attach documents, screenshots, mockups, or links to related work -->



---

> **What happens next:** The CIO will triage this request within 2 business days. If approved, a BRD will be created and the project will enter the governance lifecycle. You can track progress on the GitHub Projects board.
